Interface AsyncApi3xServer

All Superinterfaces:
AsyncApiServer, Node, Server, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
AsyncApi30Server, AsyncApi31Server
All Known Implementing Classes:
AsyncApi30ServerImpl, AsyncApi31ServerImpl
public interface AsyncApi3xServer extends AsyncApiServer
